title: Sw Method, Spel Class
syntax:
Function Sw (BitNumber As Integer) As Boolean

Function Sw (Label As String) As Boolean
parameters:
BitNumber	Integer expression representing one of the standard or expansion inputs.

Label	String expression containing an input bit label.
description: Returns the selected input bit status.
see_also:
In

InBCD

MemSw

Off

On

Oport

Sw Example

VB Example:

If m_spel.Sw(1) Then

  m_spel.On(2)

End If

C# Example:

if (m_spel.Sw(1))

   m_spel.On(2);
examples:
If m_spel.Sw(1) Then m_spel.On(2)
End If
